entries.question: external cadence dispatch は何を実行したか
entries.answer: Cadence dispatch deferred execution and will poll again around 2026-06-03T19:05:13.611Z.
entries.expectation_state: external cadence scheduling can now defer safely using the runtime schedule artifact

entries.question: framework self-audit で次に残る gap は何か
entries.answer: cadence still needs either a chosen production scheduler profile or a deeper autonomous self-start policy
entries.expectation_state: scheduler binding is now machine-readable for cadence-dispatch across cron, GitHub Actions, and agent-loop profiles
entries.mismatch_state: cadence still needs either a chosen production scheduler profile or a deeper autonomous self-start policy
entries.scale_direction: choose and formalize the primary production scheduler profile for cadence-dispatch

entries.question: external scheduler は cadence-dispatch をどう起動すべきか
entries.answer: Use cadence-dispatch on a 60-minute cadence, or invoke immediately when scheduler_state is invoke-now.
entries.expectation_state: scheduler binding is now explicit for cron, GitHub Actions, and agent-loop profiles
entries.scale_direction: choose one scheduler profile and bind it to cadence-dispatch in real operation
